case_title: LIM, EDNA B. VS BARBATO FAMILY TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: THE NAME OF DEFT WAS CHANGE TO BARBATO DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, EDNA B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBATO FAMILY TRUST $866.67 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $946.67, THE PLTF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO NAME THE BARBATO FAMILY TRUST AS A DEFT HEREIN. DEFT LYNETTE GACK IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY LIM, EDNA B. AS TO DEFENDANT BARBATO FAMILY TRUST GACK, LYNETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARBATO FAMILY TRUST

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBATO FAMILY TRUST GACK, LYNETTE $866.67 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $946.67, THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO NAME THE BARBATO FAMILY TRUST AS A DEFENDANT HEREIN. DEFENDANT LYNETTE GACK IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED. JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
